title: GiantCraft Reborn
body:
When I was playing Minecraft 1.2.5, I was using such pack as GiantCraft. It was abandoned so I decided to recreate it.



There you have it, GiantCraft for modern Minecraft



You can also try my other packs:

[Connected World](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-world-16x)

[Uncrafted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/uncrafted-resourcepack)

[Original Art](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/original-art)









My video showcase:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/z4QH4-I15MI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Anybody is free to use this pack anywhere. Just do not rename the pack, please.



If you have any questions or you want to support what I do:
